raw.objective: “these estimated CL values would assist the clinician in the individualization of phenobarbitone dosing regimens”
raw.covariates: Tested: CBZ, VPA, Age, gender, PHB daily dose, WT on CL Included: CBZ, VPA, WT on CL
raw.observations: CBZ and VPA influence PHB CL to a large degree. No goodness of fit plots given.
raw.equations: if(CBZ==1) CO=theta3 if(VPA==1) CO=theta4 CL/F=theta1*(WT**theta2)*CO*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) CBZ: comedication with carbamazepine (yes=1, no=0) VPA: comedication with valproate/valproic acid (yes=1, no=0)

extraction_target.title: Detection of a drug-drug interaction on population-based phenobarbitone clearance using nonlinear mixed-effects modeling.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: if(CBZ==1) CO=theta3 if(VPA==1) CO=theta4 CL/F=theta1*(WT**theta2)*CO*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) CBZ: comedication with carbamazepine (yes=1, no=0) VPA: comedication with valproate/valproic acid (yes=1, no=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “these estimated CL values would assist the clinician in the individualization of phenobarbitone dosing regimens”

covariates.raw: Tested: CBZ, VPA, Age, gender, PHB daily dose, WT on CL Included: CBZ, VPA, WT on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
